name: 05 — Job Discovery Run (Scheduled + Manual)
_comment: ARCHITECTURE NOTE: n8n does NOT re-implement scoring, dedup, classification, or discovery profile logic. It only triggers POST /discover on the Netlify function. Set SITE_URL and DISCOVERY_SECRET env vars in n8n. DISCOVERY_SECRET must match the server env var of the same name.

_env_vars_required.SITE_URL: Your Netlify site URL, e.g. https://your-app.netlify.app
_env_vars_required.DISCOVERY_SECRET: Must match DISCOVERY_SECRET env var set in Netlify — required for /discover auth

_notes: This workflow fires every 6 hours. Adjust the schedule in 'Schedule Trigger (Every 6h)' as needed.
Manual trigger is available for on-demand discovery runs from the n8n UI.
DISCOVERY_SECRET is passed as X-Discovery-Secret header — must match server env var.
All scoring, dedup, and classification happen inside the Netlify function. n8n only triggers it.
If /discover returns 401, check DISCOVERY_SECRET in both n8n and Netlify environments.
If discovery is disabled (LIVE_INTAKE_ENABLED != true), the function returns ok:false with a message — n8n logs and continues.
Combine with workflow 02 (approval digest) to notify when the queue grows after a discovery run.

LEVER SUPPORT: Lever is the second live source. Set LEVER_BOARDS env var (comma-separated company slugs, e.g. atlassian,canva) in Netlify. Enable the src-lever-boards source in the Sources UI. No changes to this workflow are needed — /discover handles both Greenhouse and Lever.

SOURCE-SPECIFIC TESTING: To test a single source, POST with body {"sourceId":"src-greenhouse-boards"} or {"sourceId":"src-lever-boards"} instead of an empty body. The manual trigger in this workflow always runs all enabled sources.

LEVER ACTIVATION ORDER: (1) Set LEVER_BOARDS in Netlify env, (2) enable src-lever-boards in Sources UI, (3) run this workflow manually once, (4) verify queue quality, (5) run a second time to confirm dedup, (6) only then keep the schedule active.
DO NOT activate multiple new source families simultaneously. Prove Lever clean before enabling others.
ROLLBACK: To disable Lever only, disable src-lever-boards in the Sources UI or set LEVER_BOARDS= (empty) in Netlify and redeploy. Greenhouse remains unaffected.
